global_summary.note: 包含 reuse 步：cache 側可為 cached tensor 與 baseline 全算比較。

time_axis_note: step_idx 0..T-1：0=第一步(DDIM t=T-1)，T-1=最後一步(DDIM t=0)；per_block_step_error key 為字串化 DDIM timestep t

cache_scheduler_runtime_overrides.note: Overrides are unions on top of Stage1-expanded recompute sets; they do not replace Stage1 scheduler JSON.

cache_runtime_override_contract.interpretation: Safety overrides apply only to cache diagnostic pass (runtime union). stage2_refined_scheduler_config.json masks are Stage2 refine results unless merged elsewhere.
